response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack and systems developer with broad language exposure, but is a poor fit for this embedded networking security role. The position requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which the candidate does not have (English, Romanian, German only) — a hard disqualifier. Additionally, there is no evidence of Linux kernel modification experience, L2/L3 networking, network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), or switch/firmware development. C experience is limited to one early-career role and a thesis project.
strengths: Long, diverse software engineering career with senior/staff-level roles
Some C/C++ and Linux systems experience (LabWindows/CVI components, audio server thesis)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, and open-source contributions
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement for the role
No embedded networking, switch, kernel, or security-protocol (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP/NETCONF) experience
Recent career centered on web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js), far from embedded C firmware work
